student_metadata.paper: Analysis of SVM with Indefinite Kernels (NIPS 2009)

task_description: Baseline Comparison - Comparing proposed method with standard SVM

llm_tools_used.purpose: Assisted in structuring the comparison and identifying failure scenarios

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Compare standard SVM with the indefinite kernel SVM proposed in the paper
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: Provided comparison table and identified key advantages and failure modes

top_5_prompts: What are the limitations of standard SVM when handling indefinite kernels?
How does the min-max framework improve over ad-hoc spectrum clipping?
What are the convergence guarantees of the proposed method vs standard SVM?
In what scenarios does the proposed method fail?
Compare computational complexity of standard SVM vs indefinite kernel SVM

student_declaration.declaration: I declare that I have used LLM tools as disclosed above. The final comparison is my own.
